cases.prompt: Plan a 4-week launch campaign for a new Thai skincare brand on Instagram and TikTok. Include budget split.
Propose 10 high-intent SEO keywords for a Bangkok dental clinic targeting expats.
What taxes and fees apply when transferring a condo in Bangkok valued at 5 million THB?
A seller is selling a residential property held 3 years. Explain the withholding tax (WHT) calculation in Thailand.
Draft a Thai VAT invoice template with the legally required fields (seller/buyer tax ID, VAT line, etc.).
Draft a simple service agreement outline (sections) for a freelance web developer engagement.
Map a marketing funnel (awareness → conversion) for a B2B SaaS targeting Thai SMEs.
Compare the tax implications of leasing vs buying office space for a Thai company.
Outline a project proposal for a 6-month software implementation: scope, milestones, pricing.
Define a brand voice for a premium Thai tea brand targeting Gen Z. Give 3 do's and 3 don'ts.
